imap_sweep_tuesday.batch_5_reply_peak: Day 3-7 (today through Tuesday). Day-3 bump arriving today significantly increases probability. Weekend monitoring strongly recommended.
imap_sweep_tuesday.what_to_write_if_new_reply: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json. Classify in this file. Update value_delivery_queue.json if INTERESTED. Log CHANGELOG same session.

weekend_monitoring.instruction: If HANDS has IMAP access over the weekend: sweep Batch 5 leads Saturday or Sunday morning. Reply peak post-bump is typically within 24-48 hours. An INTERESTED reply over the weekend enables a Monday morning proposal.
weekend_monitoring.if_interested_reply_weekend: Write to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here. Prepare proposal draft — send Monday morning. Do NOT wait until Tuesday. 24h SLA is from time of reply, not from next business day.
weekend_monitoring.if_not_interested: Classify. Suppress. Block LinkedIn. Log CHANGELOG.
weekend_monitoring.if_unsubscribe: Suppress within 24h regardless of weekend — GDPR Article 21 applies at all times.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24 hours — MANDATORY. Log CHANGELOG. Activate LinkedIn within Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19). Update CRM/pipeline stage to 'proposal_sent' after proposal sent. Update value_delivery_queue.json.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.
if_interested.linkedin_deadline: Day 7 = Tuesday 2026-05-19. Archive trigger fires immediately if missed.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Suppress email channel permanently. Block LinkedIn permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause sequence. Resume Day-7 bump day after stated return. Do not re-send during OOO period. 4-touchpoint limit still applies.
if_ooo.resume_rule: If OOO return date is after Tuesday 2026-05-19: resume Day-7 on day after return. If return is after Day-14 window: sequence ends — do not contact further.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress permanently within 24 hours (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Block all channels.

summary.hands_instructions: 1. IMAP sweep Tuesday 2026-05-19 — per lead before each Day-7 send (NOT leads 1/3/22). Recommended also Saturday or Sunday post-bump. 2. Write any new replies to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here. 3. If INTERESTED: 24h proposal SLA — non-negotiable. LinkedIn by Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19). 4. If NOT_INTERESTED: cancel Day-7 send, block all channels, log CHANGELOG. 5. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21), log audit_log.
